name: Mabo Dhofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok and coat with the oils.
2. Add garlic, leeks, and red peppers. Stir fry over high heat for 15 seconds.
3. Reduce heat to medium, add mushrooms and sauté for 1 minute.
4. Add water, sake (optional), soy sauce, salt, 7-spice pepper, and ketchup. Bring to a boil and cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add tofu and return to a boil.
6. Dissolve cornstarch in water and stir into the wok. Simmer until thick.
7. Garnish with scallions.
Or use minced scallions or onions
I substituted sherry
+ I used 1/4 tsp crushed chilies
